core_skills: SQL, Python, Data Automation, Data Pipelines, AI Tools
skill_match_scores: SQL:1.0, Python:1.0, Data Automation:0.5, Data Pipelines:0.5, AI Tools:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Data Analytics, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field, 1+ years of hands-on experience with SQL, Python, or comparable data tools, Demonstrated ability to build automation workflows or data pipelines, Deep familiarity with and experience using AI tools and AI Agents, Strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate finance problems into technical solutions, Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple initiatives, Mandarin language proficiency required, Comfortable communicating with engineers, Fast learner
preferred_quals: Strong understanding of GAAP principles and financial reporting structures preferred, Experience applying AI/ML techniques to structured financial data is strongly preferred
core_responsibilities: You will work with product and technology teams to automate our manual accounting processes, You will work with our technology teams to form a datalake for our financial products, establishing multiple integrations with our operation systems to sync data on a daily basis, Build data validations to cross-check data accuracy and timeliness, Automate financial reporting from our centralized data source, Leverage AI to find insight and drive actionable changes to our operations/technology, Architect and implement a centralized financial data infrastructure that unifies ERP, accounting, product, and operational systems into a single source of truth, Transition finance from manual, reactive reporting to automated, real-time financial intelligence, Design and deploy scalable data pipelines and integrations to ensure accurate, daily synchronization of financial and operational data, Establish rigorous data validation, governance, and audit controls to ensure accuracy, integrity, and compliance across all financial systems, Automate core accounting workflows, reconciliations, and reporting processes to materially reduce close cycle time and manual workload
job_summary: Bridge Legal is a hyper-growth tech startup that provides an AI-powered platform to help plaintiff law firms streamline casework. The AI Product Engineer [Accounting] will architect intelligent financial systems, automate accounting processes, and leverage AI to transform financial data into strategic insights.
